name: Site
description: A website built with the drag-and-drop builder: a shared top navbar plus an ordered tree of pages.

attributes.name: schemaVersion
attributes.description: Version of the serialized site format, used to migrate older saved sites.

attributes.name: navbar
attributes.description: The customizable top navigation bar shared by every page.

attributes.name: pages
attributes.description: The site's top-level pages, in nav order. There is always at least one.
